variant: FL-25 Forktruck Lift, TR-25 and TR-19 Four-Post Runway Lifts

specifications.lifting_mechanism: 5-inch hydraulic cylinder attached to (4) #646 leaf chains

features: Direct-drive hydraulic cylinder with leaf chain system - no cables
Adjustable runways fit any vehicle wheelbase
Adjustable track width from 4 to 8 feet
FL-25: Designed specifically for forklift/forktruck service
TR-19: Accommodates passenger cars, trucks, utility vehicles, small RVs
TR-25: Accommodates trucks, buses, utility vehicles, and passenger cars

optional_equipment.description: Raise tires off tracks for wheel, brake, and axle service
Can be ordered up to 9 inches wider for oversized vehicles

certifications: Meets ANSI/ALI ALCTV safety standard for automotive lifts
Manufactured in compliance with ALI, ANSI, ASME, AISI, ASTM, ASA, NEC, AWG, NEMA
safety_features: Multi-position mechanical locking wedge - infinite positioning
Leaf chain synchronization for level operation
Single-position two-hand release for controlled lowering
notes: Combined manual covers TR-19, TR-25, and FL-25 models
FL-25 is specifically designed for forklift/forktruck maintenance
All models are proudly designed, welded, and manufactured in the USA
PDF stored as Git LFS pointer - actual binary content unavailable at extraction time
